title: Config store with strong ETag optimistic concurrency

difficulty.rationale: Requires a deterministic canonical serialization hashed into a strong ETag, correct RFC 7232 conditional-request semantics (412 not 409, 428 when the precondition is missing, wildcard match), and a compare-and-set on the content hash that prevents concurrent lost updates.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /configs creates an entry with a quoted hex sha256 ETag header.
GET returns the same deterministic ETag for unchanged content.
PUT with a matching If-Match applies the update and returns a new ETag.
PUT with a stale or mismatched If-Match returns 412 precondition_failed.
must_not: Allow two concurrent updates on the same original ETag to both succeed.
Apply an update when If-Match is absent.
Use a non-deterministic or version-counter value as the ETag.
edge_cases: If-Match wildcard matches any existing entry.
If-Match comparison ignores surrounding quotes and an optional W/ prefix.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
